$comment: B6-T05 (Cycle 6 batch 6, T52) — frozen skip baseline for the C18 ratchet test ('every-tool-has-network-policy-or-justified-skip'). Each entry documents WHY a tool_id has no static or helm-templated NetworkPolicy YAML pinning its egress; the runtime sandbox driver still renders a NetworkPolicy v1 manifest at job-submission time via src.sandbox.network_policies.render_networkpolicy_manifest. Adding a new tool requires either (a) extending the static infra YAML coverage so the tool drops out of this baseline naturally, or (b) appending a new entry here with an explicit reason + approved_in marker. CI fails loudly when a new tool falls into neither bucket. Removing an entry is BLOCKING (the test fails if a baseline tool_id is no longer in the catalog) — this defends against silent drift where a renamed YAML leaves a stale skip.
generated_by: B6-T05 worker (frozen snapshot — DO NOT regenerate without explicit baseline-bump PR)
